INVALID POS ON LEONEL GOMEZ, NO INFORMATION GIVEN.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-09-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
